steps.title: Factor out the greatest common factor
steps.content: The greatest common factor of $32x$ and $56$ is $8$. Factoring by $8$ means each original term must be split into the outside factor and the remaining inside factor.

steps.title: Rewrite the expression
steps.content: $$32x+56=8(4x)+8(7)=8(4x+7)$$The equivalent expression is $8(4x+7)$. The answer is D.
